mapper.sql: id, title, image_file_id, link_url, placement, target_platform, start_at, end_at, active, priority, weight, impression_count, click_count, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM advertisement WHERE active = 1 AND placement = #{placement} AND (start_at IS NULL OR start_at <= #{now}) AND (end_at IS NULL OR end_at > #{now}) AND (target_platform = 'ALL' OR target_platform = #{platform}) ORDER BY priority DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE advertisement SET impression_count = impression_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE advertisement SET click_count = click_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT plan FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO advertisement (title, image_file_id, link_url, placement, target_platform, start_at, end_at, active, priority, weight, created_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{imageFileId}, #{linkUrl}, #{placement}, #{targetPlatform}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{active}, #{priority}, #{weight}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE advertisement SET title = #{title}, image_file_id = #{imageFileId}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, placement = #{placement}, target_platform = #{targetPlatform}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, active = #{active}, priority = #{priority}, weight = #{weight} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE advertisement SET active = #{active} WHERE id = #{id}
